Flavours of India EP4 : BISI BELE BATH
Bisi bele bath with laterally means hot lentil rice is one of the iconic dishes from Karnataka. The special masala powder adds on the unique flavour to this dish. It’s a one pot wholesome meal made with vegetables, lentil and rice. Piping hot Bisibelebath with a dollop of ghee and crunchy karaboondhi will definitely impress your taste buds! The consistency is the key and I have given exact measurements to help you achieve this consistency every time you cook. Try it!

Ingredients:
Rice- 1 cup
Toor dal- 3/4 cup
Salt- 1 tablespoon + 1 teaspoon 
Turmeric powder- 1/2 teaspoon
Tamarind- Lemon sized
Carrot- 1
Beans- 12
Potato- 1
Green peas- 1/4 cup
Onion- 1
Tomato- 2
Tempering:
Mustard seeds- 1 teaspoon 
Red chili- 1
Curry leaves 
Cashews. 
Roast and Grind: (Bisibelebath Powder)
Oil- 1 teaspoon 
Urad dal- 11/4 tablespoon 
Channa dal- 1 tablespoon 
Red chilli- 12
Peppercorns- 10 
Cumin seeds- 1 teaspoon 
Fenugreek seeds- 1/4 teaspoon
Coconut- 2 tablespoons 
Coriander seeds- 2 tablespoons 
Cloves- 3
Cardamom- 1
Cinnamon- 1 inch piece.

Preparation:
Wash and soak rice and dal together for 30 mins.
Add 7.5 cups of water to rice and dal mixture along with chopped vegetables, turmeric powder, salt and pressure cook for 8 whistles.
Soak and extract tamarind juice and keep aside.
Roast the given ingredients in oil and grind to a coarse powder.
In a pan heat oil and add tempering.
Add onion and tomatoes and sauté.
Add ground powder and sauté briefly.
Add tamarind extract and let it boil for 3-4mins.
Add cooked rice mix and mix well with 1 teaspoon of salt. 
Mix well and serve with ghee and karabhoondhi.
Try it!

caption:
A fine dining experience like no other! ✨ @spiceklubchennai 

This pure veg restaurant takes innovation to the next level, serving each dish with a creative twist. From the chic and neat ambiance to the crafted flavors, every detail is designed to impress. 

The highlights I tried? 
Gulabo - a drink prepared right in front of you, where every ingredient like rose syrup, rose caviar is added like a chemistry formula, turning mixology into an art! ❤️🍹

Mango on the Rocks – A mango milkshake, but deconstructed! Solid mango meets a warm mango hot sauce for a sip-worthy surprise🥭🔥

Pani Puri – Sweet chutney in a syringe, spicy paani in a test tube🧪🤩

Pav Bhaji Fondue – A cheesy, dippable dish with bite-sized bhaji & buttery pav. A whole new way to enjoy this classic! 🫕🧀

Nutella Cookie for dessert – Made fresh in front of you, fried in some water (yes, you read that right!), and topped with nutella sauce 🍪😲

I've also tried naan and paneer lababdar for the main course 🫓

And to top it all off, they serve eight different types of chutneys as complimentary sides, adding an extra burst of flavor to every dish. 🍽️🔥

A fine dining experience like no other! ✨ @spiceklubchennai 

This pure veg restaurant takes innovation to the next level, serving each dish with a creative twist. From the chic and neat ambiance to the crafted flavors, every detail is designed to impress. 

The highlights I tried? 
Gulabo - a drink prepared right in front of you, where every ingredient like rose syrup, rose caviar is added like a chemistry formula, turning mixology into an art! ❤️🍹

Mango on the Rocks – A mango milkshake, but deconstructed! Solid mango meets a warm mango hot sauce for a sip-worthy surprise🥭🔥

Pani Puri – Sweet chutney in a syringe, spicy paani in a test tube🧪🤩

Pav Bhaji Fondue – A cheesy, dippable dish with bite-sized bhaji & buttery pav. A whole new way to enjoy this classic! 🫕🧀

Nutella Cookie for dessert – Made fresh in front of you, fried in some water (yes, you read that right!), and topped with nutella sauce 🍪😲

I've also tried naan and paneer lababdar for the main course 🫓

And to top it all off, they serve eight different types of chutneys as complimentary sides, adding an extra burst of flavor to every dish. 🍽️🔥

caption:
📍Crispy and spicy, Roadside kaalan (mushroom)

Ingredients:

For the mushroom batter:
1. Mushroom- 250 gms
2. Cabbage-250 gms
3. Maida/ all purpose flour- 2 tbsp
4. Corn flour- 2 tbsp
5. Ginger garlic paste - 2 tbsp
6. Garam masala - 1 tsp
7. Salt
8. Red chilli powder - 1 tbsp
9. Turmeric powder - 1 tsp

For the sauce:
1. oil- 2 tbsp
2. Curry leaves
3. Onions( finely chopped)- 2
4. Ginger garlic paste- 2 tsp
5. Tomato sauce - 8 tsp
6. Green chilli sauce - 1 tsp
7. Salt
8. Chilli powder - 1 tbsp
9. Water
10. Corn flour mixture

Garnish:
1. Onion (finely chopped)
2. Coriander leaves

Recipe:
1. Mix all the ingredients mentioned to make the mushroom and cabbage batter ready to fry. 
2. Take a pan, heat it and add oil, let that heat up as well. Add the batter in small portions.
3. Fry until crisp and golden brown and keep it aside.
4. For the sauce, take a pan and heat up the pan with the oil.
5. Add curry leaves.
6. Add onion and let it cook until it gets a glassy coat.
7. Do not let it fry until golden brown in colour.
8. Add this stage add ginger garlic paste and mix well till the raw smell has gone.
9. Add in the tomato sauce and chilli sauce along with chilli powder and salt.
10. Mix well and add water to adjust its consistency.
11. Mix in corn flour with water and add into the sauce to thicken it.
12. Now add the fried mushrooms and let it soak in the sauce, mash it well,
13. Garnish it and it is ready to serve! 

Roadside kaalan is one of my most favourite local dish of chennai! Do try it out and let me know in the comments below on how it is!!

A fine dining experience like no other! ✨ @spiceklubchennai 

This pure veg restaurant takes innovation to the next level, serving each dish with a creative twist. From the chic and neat ambiance to the crafted flavors, every detail is designed to impress. 

The highlights I tried? 
Gulabo - a drink prepared right in front of you, where every ingredient like rose syrup, rose caviar is added like a chemistry formula, turning mixology into an art! ❤️🍹

Mango on the Rocks – A mango milkshake, but deconstructed! Solid mango meets a warm mango hot sauce for a sip-worthy surprise🥭🔥

Pani Puri – Sweet chutney in a syringe, spicy paani in a test tube🧪🤩

Pav Bhaji Fondue – A cheesy, dippable dish with bite-sized bhaji & buttery pav. A whole new way to enjoy this classic! 🫕🧀

Nutella Cookie for dessert – Made fresh in front of you, fried in some water (yes, you read that right!), and topped with nutella sauce 🍪😲

I've also tried naan and paneer lababdar for the main course 🫓

And to top it all off, they serve eight different types of chutneys as complimentary sides, adding an extra burst of flavor to every dish. 🍽️🔥

An origin story: Years ago, our Creative Chef @chindivaradarajulu and @bhujag were on a trip to Ghuangzhou, China, where after a long day of exploring and scouting, they stopped at a local street vendor to have a hurried lunch. 
The noodle that they were served was so unforgettable, that they knew they absolutely HAD to recreate it, with no recipe and no name! After many painstaking days with the talented team in the Zhouyu kitchen, we were able to bring to you - our version of the Ghuangzhou Street Noodle. Not too spicy but bursting with flavour and the smokiness from the Wok Hey. Enjoy!

caption:
Our trip started with a plan to visit Dubai first and then to abudhabi , so we booked our flights early. Later, we decided to explore Yas Island, Abu Dhabi first, but by then, we couldn't change our flights. So, we landed in Dubai and took a taxi to Abu Dhabi.

Kushi outfit @firstcryindia
Kushi shoes @skechers

We booked Emirates flights at a great price months in advance. It was Kushi's first international trip, so we wanted to capture every moment! The flight crew was super friendly and even posed for pictures, making her so happy.

For our stay, we chose DoubleTree by Hilton (without food), which is right next to Warner Bros. Studios. Since we were travelling with Kushi, we planned a relaxed trip, visiting only Warner Bros. and SeaWorld. We stayed for two nights and had an amazing time!

Yas Island feels like a world of its own! You can order food easily through apps like Talabat and Noon. There are also nearby malls where you can buy groceries and cook in your hotel room.

Sharing these little travel moments with you all! Stay tuned for more! ✈️✨
